title: meoschium rugosum
intro: Meoschium rugosum, also known as "Rough Meoschium", is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Meoschium rugosum include relief from congestion, coughs, and colds, making it a popular herbal remedy. Meoschium rugosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
